@graph.description: Systematic review of 15 interventional trials found most sleep/anxiety studies improved at least one parameter, but evidence is limited by heterogeneity, small samples, formulation differences, and combination products. Strongest wording: may support sleep quality or mild anxiety especially where magnesium status is low.
@graph.name: Magnesium
